item.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0323A01B maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 29, 04:00 - 15:00 UTC

Mar 9, 15:39 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 29/04/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 29/04/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance operation, our servers will be temporarily unavailable. We invite you to shut down your servers yourself to avoid any inconvenience.
We will make every effort to minimize the duration of the downtime and restore service as quickly as possible.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [YYZ01][Cooling System] - Rack YYZ0101A02B maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 28, 11:00 - 19:30 UTC

Mar 4, 14:23 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in rack YYZ0101A02B.

Start time : 28/04/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 28/04/2026 19:30 UTC

Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
